title: OpenChronology Universe Definition Schema
description: Schema for .chronverse files — standalone, independently hostable universe definitions. A .chronverse file describes a single universe: its temporal anchoring, default calendar, canon scope declarations, and related universes. The real universe is a built-in and never requires a .chronverse file.

meta.description: File-level metadata for the universe definition.

id.description: Stable machine-readable identifier (e.g. 'star-wars-disney', 'tolkien-legendarium'). Used as the key in .chron definitions.universes.

version.description: Semver string for this universe definition (e.g. '1.0.0').

display_name.description: Human-readable name of the universe (e.g. 'Star Wars Galaxy (Disney Canon)').

author.description: Author(s) or rights holder(s) for this universe definition.

canonical_url.description: The authoritative hosted URL for this .chronverse file. SHOULD be populated for any universe intended for external reference.

description.description: Human-readable description of the universe and its origin.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL. Should point to this schema.

type.description: 'absolute' means the universe has its own independent time axis. 'relative' means it is anchored to another universe via an offset.

anchor.description: Required when type is 'relative'. Anchors this universe to a target universe at a known offset.

target_universe.description: ID of the universe this is anchored to (typically 'real').

offset_value.description: ISO 8601 datetime in the target universe that corresponds to this universe's epoch.

scale_factor.description: Time dilation factor. 1.0 = same rate as target. Use for time dilation or compressed fictional time.

defaults.description: Default values inherited by events that reference this universe and omit these fields.

calendar.description: Default calendar ID for events in this universe. Events that declare this universe MAY omit temporal.calendar.

calendar_ref.description: URL or path to the .chroncal file for the default calendar.

body.description: Default spatial body for events in this universe.

canon_scopes.description: Authoritative definitions of canon scope identifiers for this universe. Parsers validating relation.canon.scope values SHOULD check them against this array when the universe definition is resolved.

related_universes.description: References to related universe definitions (variants, parallels, branches, alternate timelines).

canon_scope.description: A declared canon scope for this universe. The id here is the value used in relation.canon.scope.

display_name.description: Human-readable name for this scope (e.g. 'Disney Canon', 'Star Wars Legends').

description.description: Explanation of what this scope covers.

supersedes.description: ID of the canon scope this one replaces.

superseded_by.description: ID of the canon scope that replaced this one.

related_universe_ref.description: Reference to a related universe definition.

ref.description: URL or path to the related universe's .chronverse file.

relationship.description: Nature of the relationship between this universe and the referenced universe.
